title: Converting CSV to Inverted Index
scenario: Given a CSV file with columns 'ID', 'Name', and 'Email', convert it into an inverted index data structure where each key is an email and the value is a list of IDs of customers who have that email. The target output should be a JSON object. Constraints: Must handle string manipulation, must use a loop to iterate over the CSV rows.
constraints: Must use a loop to iterate over the CSV rows

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the generated code adhere to the constraints?
Is the generated JSON syntax valid?
Is the generated code efficient in terms of time complexity?
